channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The ethical debate on capital punishment for child rapists in South Africa
item.description: This opinion piece, written by Percy Mabandu, explores the complex ethical and legal implications of capital punishment for child rapists in South Africa. In light of recent horrifying child abuse cas...

item.title: South Africa Faces Urgent AI Challenges Amid Global Tech Race
item.description: South Africa is lagging behind in the global race to harness artificial intelligence (AI) effectively. Despite the release of a draft national AI policy, the country struggles with basic digital infra...

item.title: Julie Defensor denies family involvement in Pasig raid, calls claims a smear campaign
item.description: Julie Defensor, wife of former lawmaker Mike Defensor, has strongly denied any involvement in the establishment recently raided by the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) in Pasig City. The NBI had...

item.title: Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner: Details and Suspect Information
item.description: A gunman opened fire at the annual White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington, D.C. on Saturday evening, prompting a swift evacuation of President Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, an...

item.title: Local Kids Embrace Fishing and Outdoor Activities in ACT
item.description: Around Lake Tuggeranong and other local waterways, there's a noticeable surge in young people taking up fishing. Many kids, particularly boys, are being drawn away from screens to enjoy the tranquilli...

item.title: Rediscovering Life’s Joy and Wisdom Through Lin Yu Tang’s Classic
item.description: Lin Yu Tang’s 1938 masterpiece, The Importance of Living, remains a timeless guide for those seeking balance, humour, and wisdom in life. Chinese by origin and later an American resident, Lin Yu Tang ...

item.title: Opposition Leaders Plan Single Presidential Candidate for 2027 Elections
item.description: Top opposition leaders for Nigeria don agree say dem go come together present one single presidential candidate for the 2027 general election to challenge President Bola Tinubu of APC. Dis decision co...

item.title: Report Claims Iranian Strikes Damaged US Bases, Extent of Damage Remains Unclear
item.description: A recently released report has sparked considerable discussion regarding alleged attacks on United States military bases in the Gulf region attributed to Iran. The report claims that Iranian strikes r...

item.title: Angus Taylor comments on the frequency of Welcome to Country ceremonies following Anzac Day incidents
item.description: Opposition Leader Angus Taylor has sparked debate by suggesting that Welcome to Country ceremonies have become overused and, as a result, devalued. His remarks came after Indigenous speakers faced boo...

item.title: Trump and attendees unharmed after security incident at White House correspondents’ dinner
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump was unharmed after a security incident at the annual White House Correspondents’ Association dinner held at the Washington Hilton. Shortly after taking his seat on-stage, g...

item.title: NTF-ELCAC Advises Overseas Filipinos to Avoid Involvement in Armed Conflicts at Home
item.description: The National Task Force to End Local Communist Armed Conflict (NTF-ELCAC) has issued a cautionary advisory for Filipinos living overseas, urging them to avoid getting involved in any form of armed con...

item.title: Orbán steps back from Parliament after historic election defeat in Hungary
item.description: Hungary’s long-serving prime minister, Viktor Orbán, has announced that he will not take a seat in parliament following his party’s decisive defeat in the April 12 election. Instead, he plans to focus...

item.title: Pakistan may raise interest rates amid Gulf war uncertainty
item.description: KARACHI: The financial market is largely expecting an increase in the interest rate in the upcoming State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) monetary policy meeting on Monday. Experts suggest that this potential ...

item.title: New Particle Discovery Sheds Light on Origin of Mass
item.description: A groundbreaking physics experiment conducted by researchers at The University of Osaka has uncovered evidence of a novel form of matter – an η′-mesic nucleus. This exotic state involves a fleeting pa...

item.title: UK government prepares contingency measures for supply disruptions linked to Iran conflict
item.description: The UK government is intensifying its contingency planning to address potential food and fuel shortages arising from the ongoing conflict involving Iran, particularly due to the closure of the Strait ...

item.title: Raghav Chadha sees a significant drop in Instagram followers following AAP rebellion

item.title: WhatsApp messages reveal plot behind Jerry Boshoga’s kidnapping and torture

item.title: Trump and officials evacuated after reported shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
